description: Tomorrow plan with pattern insights produces valid schema (all required sections)

input.teacher_reflection: Writing block was hard again. Ari needed full modelling today, though the word bank helped a bit. Mika settled faster after lunch with the step checklist — that's progress. Jae finished the extension task and shared in debrief. EA was present all afternoon.
input.teacher_goal: Continue building on Ari's writing independence. Keep Mika's checklist routine going.
